methods.name: Add
methods.signature: public RhinoView Add(string title, DefinedViewportProjection projection, Rectangle position, bool floating)
methods.summary: Constructs a new Rhino view and, at the same time, adds it to the list.

params.name: title
params.doc: The title of the new Rhino view.

params.name: projection
params.doc: A basic projection type.

params.name: position
params.doc: A position.

params.name: floating
params.doc: true if the view floats; false if it is docked.

returns.doc: The newly constructed Rhino view; or null on error.

methods.name: AddPageView(String)
methods.summary: Constructs a new page view with a given title and, at the same time, adds it to the list.

params.name: title
params.doc: If null or empty, a name will be generated as "Page #" where # is the largest page number.

returns.doc: The newly created page view on success; or null on error.

methods.name: AddPageView(String, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public RhinoPageView AddPageView(string title, double pageWidth, double pageHeight)
methods.summary: Constructs a new page view with a given title and size and, at the same time, adds it to the list.

params.name: title
params.doc: If null or empty, a name will be generated as "Page #" where # is the largest page number.

params.name: pageWidth
params.doc: The page total width.

params.name: pageHeight
params.doc: The page total height.

returns.doc: The newly created page view on success; or null on error.

methods.name: EnableCameraIcon
methods.summary: Use to turn camera icon on and off

params.name: view
params.doc: If null, any camera icon is turned off. If not null, the camera icon for that view is turned on.

methods.name: EnableRedraw
methods.signature: public void EnableRedraw(bool enable, bool redrawDocument, bool redrawLayers)

params.name: enable
params.doc: Enable redrawing.

params.name: redrawDocument
params.doc: If enabling, set to true to have the document redrawn.

params.name: redrawLayers
params.doc: If enabling, set to true to have the layer user interface redrawn.

methods.name: Find(Guid)
methods.summary: Finds a view in this document with a given main viewport Id.

params.name: mainViewportId
params.doc: The ID of the main viewport looked for.

returns.doc: View on success. null if the view could not be found in this document.

methods.name: Find(String, Boolean)
methods.signature: public RhinoView Find(string mainViewportName, bool compareCase)
methods.summary: Finds a view in this document with a main viewport that has a given name. Note that there may be multiple views in this document that have the same name. This function only returns the first view found. If you want to find all the views with a given name, use the GetViewList function and iterate through the views.

params.name: mainViewportName
params.doc: The name of the main viewport.

params.name: compareCase
params.doc: true if capitalization influences comparison; otherwise, false.

returns.doc: A Rhino view on success; null on error.

methods.name: FlashObjects
methods.signature: public void FlashObjects(IEnumerable<RhinoObject> list, bool useSelectionColor)
methods.summary: Cause objects selection state to change momentarily so the object appears to flash on the screen.

params.name: list
params.doc: An array, a list or any enumerable set of Rhino objects.

params.name: useSelectionColor
params.doc: If true, flash between object color and selection color. If false, flash between visible and invisible.

params.name: useMatchingViews
params.doc: [Missing <param name="useMatchingViews"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.DocObjects.Tables.ViewTable.FourViewLayout(System.Boolean)"]

methods.name: GetPageViews
methods.summary: Gets all page views in the document.

returns.doc: An array with all page views. The return value can be an empty array but not null.

methods.name: GetViewList
methods.signature: public RhinoView[] GetViewList(bool includeStandardViews, bool includePageViews)
methods.summary: Gets an array of all the views.

params.name: includeStandardViews
params.doc: true if "Right", "Perspective", etc., view should be included; false otherwise.

params.name: includePageViews
params.doc: true if page-related views should be included; false otherwise.

returns.doc: A array of Rhino views. This array can be empty, but not null.

methods.name: IsCameraIconVisible
methods.summary: Determine if a camera icon is being shown

params.name: view
params.doc: if null, then all views are tested. If not null, then just view is tested.

methods.name: Redraw
methods.remarks: If you change something in the document -- like adding objects, deleting objects, modifying layer or object display attributes, etc., then you need to call Redraw to redraw all the views. If you change something in a particular view like the projection, construction plane, background bitmap, etc., then you need to call CRhinoView::Redraw to redraw that particular view.

params.name: useMatchingViews
params.doc: [Missing <param name="useMatchingViews"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.DocObjects.Tables.ViewTable.ThreeViewLayout(System.Boolean)"]

properties.name: ActiveView
properties.summary: Gets or Sets the active view.

properties.name: Document
properties.summary: Document that owns this object table.

properties.name: RedrawEnabled
properties.summary: Returns or sets (enable or disables) screen redrawing.
